original_text: Vào thời giặc Minh xâm lược nước ta, đi đến đâu chúng cũng tàn sát người dân vô tội, cướp bóc của cải.
translated_text: Ming invaders in red armor marched through Vietnamese villages, burning thatched roofs and seizing food baskets.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, Ming invaders in red iron armor marching through a burning village, thick black smoke, villagers crying, dynamic and chaotic scene, 8k resolution.
subject: Ming invaders,Villagers

original_text: Người dân vô cùng cực khổ, lầm than. Đức Long Quân nhìn thấy cảnh đó từ trên cao.
translated_text: Peasants in rags huddled together in empty fields, their faces thin and dirty. High in the clouds, the Dragon Lord Long Quan looked down.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, poor peasants in tattered clothes huddling in a barren field, while the majestic Dragon Lord Long Quan looks down from swirling golden clouds, divine perspective, masterpiece quality.
subject: Dragon Lord,Peasants

original_text: Đức Long Quân thấy người dân cầm vũ khí thô sơ, liền quyết định cho nghĩa quân mượn thanh gươm thần.
translated_text: He saw the villagers holding bamboo spears and decided to drop a magic sword down to the mortal world.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a glowing magical sword falling from the celestial clouds toward the earth, villagers below holding simple bamboo spears, mystical light, 8k resolution.
subject: Dragon Lord,Villagers

original_text: Hồi ấy ở Thanh Hóa, có một người đi đánh cá tên là Lê Thận, đang kéo lưới trên sông đêm.
translated_text: One night, a fisherman named Le Than stood on a small boat in the dark river. He pulled up his heavy net.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a fisherman named Loyal soldier on a small wooden boat in the middle of a dark river, pulling a heavy net, moonlight reflecting on the water, professional artwork.
subject: Loyal soldier

original_text: Trong lưới không có cá mà chỉ là một lưỡi gươm cũ đầy rêu, anh mang về để ở góc nhà tranh.
translated_text: Inside was not fish, but a rusty iron sword blade covered in wet moss. Finally, he carried the rusty piece of metal home and placed it in the dark corner of his thatched hut.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a rusty iron sword blade covered in green moss inside a fishing net, a dark hut corner with a straw roof, humble interior, masterpiece quality.
subject: Loyal soldier,Rusty sword blade

original_text: Lê Thận gia nhập nghĩa quân Lam Sơn, tay cầm giáo nhọn đứng trong hàng ngũ.
translated_text: Le Than, a muscular man with a determined face, joined the Lam Son army. He wore simple soldier clothes and held a sharp spear, standing in line with other rebels.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a row of determined Lam Son rebel soldiers, Loyal soldier holding a sharp spear, wearing rustic soldier clothes, flag fluttering in the wind, 8k resolution.
subject: Loyal soldier,Lam Son rebel army

original_text: Chủ tướng Lê Lợi đi duyệt binh, gật đầu chào Lê Thận đang đứng nghiêm trang.
translated_text: General Le Loi, a charismatic leader in iron armor, walked past and nodded at Le Than, who stood tall gripping his weapon tightly.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, General rebel leader in ornate iron armor inspecting his troops, nodding to Loyal soldier, disciplined military camp background, professional artwork.
subject: rebel leader,Loyal soldier

original_text: Một lần Lê Lợi đến nhà Lê Thận nghỉ chân, thấy lưỡi gươm cũ ở góc nhà phát sáng rực rỡ.
translated_text: Le Loi visited Le Than's dark hut to rest. Suddenly, the rusty blade in the corner glowed with a blinding magical blue light, illuminating the dark room.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a dark thatched hut illuminated by a bright blue magical light coming from an old sword blade in the corner, rebel leader looking in awe, masterpiece quality.
subject: rebel leader,Glowing sword

original_text: Lê Lợi cầm lưỡi gươm lên xem, thấy hai chữ "Thuận Thiên" khắc sâu vào kim loại.
translated_text: Le Loi picked it up, wiping off the rust, and saw two glowing characters "Thuan Thien" (Will of Heaven) carved deeply into the metal.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, close-up of rebel leader's hands holding the sword blade, glowing ancient characters Thuan Thien etched in metal, golden light, highly detailed.
subject: rebel leader

original_text: Sau một trận thua, Lê Lợi chạy trốn vào rừng sâu, ẩn nấp dưới gốc đa cổ thụ.
translated_text: After a lost battle, Le Loi fled into the deep forest, his armor scratched and mud-stained. While hiding under an ancient banyan tree, he saw a strange light up in the branches.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, rebel leader hiding behind the thick roots of a giant ancient banyan tree in a dark forest, a mysterious light shining from the branches above, dramatic lighting.
subject: rebel leader

original_text: Ông trèo lên cây và tìm thấy một cái chuôi gươm nạm ngọc sáng lấp lánh trong vòm lá.
translated_text: He climbed up and found a sword hilt encrusted with jade and precious gems sparkling in the leaves. He grasped the shining hilt firmly.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, rebel leader perched on a tree branch, reaching for a sword hilt decorated with sparkling green jade and jewels, forest leaves surrounding him, 8k resolution.
subject: rebel leader,Jeweled hilt

original_text: Vài hôm sau, Lê Lợi lắp lưỡi gươm của Lê Thận vào chuôi ngọc, chúng vừa khít và sáng rực như đuốc.
translated_text: Days later, Le Loi met Le Than again. He fitted the rusty blade into the jeweled hilt. Click! They fit perfectly. The rust vanished instantly, and the sword shone brighter than a torch.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, rebel leader fitting the blade into the hilt, a blinding burst of white light, the sword becoming clean and shiny, amazed soldiers watching, professional artwork.
subject: rebel leader,Soldiers

original_text: Lê Thận và binh sĩ quỳ xuống nền đất, dâng thanh gươm hoàn chỉnh cho chủ tướng.
translated_text: Le Than and the soldiers knelt down on the earthen floor, raising their hands to offer the complete weapon to Le Loi.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, Loyal soldier and several soldiers kneeling respectfully on the ground, holding the sword up with both hands towards rebel leader, loyal atmosphere, masterpiece quality.
subject: Loyal soldier,rebel leader

original_text: Lê Lợi cưỡi chiến mã, giơ cao thanh gươm thần, quân Minh sợ hãi bỏ chạy.
translated_text: Le Loi rode a warhorse, raising the glowing magic sword high. The Ming soldiers dropped their weapons and ran north in fear.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, rebel leader on a white warhorse raising the glowing sword, Ming soldiers fleeing in panic in the background, epic battle victory, 8k resolution.
subject: rebel leader,Ming invaders

original_text: Tiếng trống trận vang lừng, nghĩa quân tiến lên, mang theo lương thực và cờ phướn.
translated_text: Victory drums beat loudly. The rebel soldiers marched forward, carrying baskets full of rice and waving flags.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a triumphant parade of rebel soldiers, beating large drums, waving colorful flags, festive and victorious mood, professional artwork.
subject: Lam Son rebel army

original_text: Đất nước sạch bóng quân thù, Lê Lợi ngồi trên ngai vàng tại kinh đô, mặc hoàng bào.
translated_text: With the invaders gone, Le Loi sat on the royal throne in the capital. He wore a yellow dragon robe and a golden crown.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, Legendary Vietnamese king sitting on a golden throne in the royal palace, wearing a bright yellow dragon robe and crown, regal and dignified, masterpiece quality.
subject: Legendary Vietnamese king

original_text: Ông đứng trên lầu cao cung điện, nhìn ngắm ruộng đồng xanh tốt và cảnh thái bình.
translated_text: He looked out from the palace balcony at the green rice paddies and busy village markets, ruling a unified land.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, Legendary Vietnamese king standing on a high palace balcony, looking out over lush green rice fields and a peaceful village, prosperity and peace, 8k resolution.
subject: Legendary Vietnamese king

original_text: Một năm sau, vua ngồi thuyền rồng dạo chơi trên hồ Tả Vọng, Rùa Vàng khổng lồ nhô lên mặt nước.
translated_text: One year later, the King sat on a dragon boat gliding over the green water of Ta Vong Lake. Suddenly, a giant Golden Turtle emerged from the water, its shell shining in the sun.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a royal dragon boat on a green lake, a giant Golden Turtle with a shimmering shell rising from the water, sunlight reflecting on ripples, professional artwork.
subject: Legendary Vietnamese king,Golden Turtle

original_text: Rùa Vàng cất tiếng nói với nhà vua, xin lại gươm thần.
translated_text: The Turtle raised its head above the surface and spoke to the King, asking for the sword.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the Golden Turtle with its head above water, looking at the King, a divine and calm interaction, green water and willow trees in background, masterpiece quality.
subject: Golden Turtle,Legendary Vietnamese king

original_text: Vua rút gươm báu ra, hai tay dâng về phía mặt nước.
translated_text: The King unsheathed the magic sword and held it out with both hands.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, Legendary Vietnamese king standing at the edge of the dragon boat, holding the magic sword horizontally with both hands, offering it to the lake, 8k resolution.
subject: Legendary Vietnamese king,Golden Turtle

original_text: Thanh gươm bay về phía miệng Rùa Vàng, Rùa ngậm lấy rồi lặn xuống sâu.
translated_text: The sword flew from his hands toward the water. The Golden Turtle caught the blade in its mouth and dove down, leaving only ripples on the surface. The lake was named Hoan Kiem.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the golden sword flying through the air into the mouth of the Golden Turtle, the turtle diving into the green water, leaving concentric ripples, professional artwork.
subject: Golden Turtle,Magic sword
